behaviors.description: The embedding vector produced for a given query string has the correct dimensionality for the vector database index.
behaviors.justification: This behavior depends on a real embedding-model output contract (vector length) on the live AI/ML path; a unit/integration fake can hide provider/model-version dimension mismatches. Rejected Workflow because the behavior text only requires one model-dependent step (embedding), not multiple model decisions chained.
behaviors.test_description: Call the real embedding model with a representative query, read the configured index dimension from the real vector-store schema/config, and assert exact dimension match; fail if model output length differs from index expectation.

behaviors.description: The similarity search returns results ordered by descending cosine similarity score.
behaviors.justification: The failure mode is module handoff/order logic between retrieval and ranking output; this is more than a single pure function but does not require real external infra or model judgment. Rejected System because behavior text does not require external contract/round-trip checks. Rejected Agentic because correctness here is score ordering logic, not AI output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Use a controlled local test index (or in-process vector DB fixture) with known vectors and query vector, run similarity search through service+repo wiring, and assert returned items are strictly/non-increasing by cosine score.

behaviors.description: The LLM re-ranking step changes the order of at least some results compared to the raw similarity ranking when the query has nuanced intent.
behaviors.justification: This explicitly tests model decision quality (nuanced intent reordering). A stubbed LLM would trivially pass/fail without validating real judgment. Rejected Workflow because this behavior is a single model-dependent re-ranking decision, not a multi-step agentic pipeline with cross-step consistency requirements.
behaviors.test_description: Run real LLM reranking on a curated nuanced-query fixture where lexical similarity and intent differ; compare pre/post order and assert at least one position changes in the expected direction for the nuanced intent.

behaviors.description: A query with no close matches in the database returns an empty result set rather than low-relevance noise.
behaviors.justification: Pass/fail depends on real embedding-space semantics and thresholding behavior for unrelated queries; mocked embeddings can hide real false-positive neighbors. Rejected Workflow because the behavior text requires a single query outcome, not consistency across multiple model-dependent steps.
behaviors.test_description: Issue real out-of-domain queries against a production-like corpus using the real embedding path and retrieval threshold logic; assert API returns an empty list (or explicit no-results status) and does not surface low-score items.

behaviors.description: The end-to-end latency from receiving the query to returning re-ranked results stays below 2 seconds for the median case.
behaviors.justification: This is an end-to-end SLA across multiple agentic steps in sequence (embedding model call + retrieval + LLM rerank), where total latency depends on cross-step orchestration and real model/service timing. Unit/integration/system slices cannot fully validate median pipeline latency behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Run a timed E2E benchmark through the real API path over a representative query set, including real embedding and reranking calls, compute median wall-clock latency from request ingress to response egress, and assert median < 2.0s.
